analytics_signin_prompt: Sign in to view your personal analytics
analytics_description: A clean overview of calendar rhythm, focus density, and the small signals that help the week stay balanced.
avg_per_day_detail: Average number of events created each day.
focus_rate_detail: Meetings that land inside planned blocks.
recurring_plans_detail: Stable routines that keep the week consistent.
weekly_pattern_item_2: Afternoons are better reserved for review and async work.
weekly_pattern_item_3: Meeting load is most balanced on Tuesday and Thursday.
suggested_actions_item_1: Protect one no-meeting block every morning.
suggested_actions_item_2: Move flexible reviews into the quietest day of the week.
suggested_actions_item_3: Group short calls into a single lightweight session.
import_invalid_format: Invalid file format (CSV or XLSX only)
contacts_description: Track the collaborators, team members, and quick-access contacts that keep scheduling friction low.
collaborators_detail: People with access to at least one shared calendar.
favorites_detail: Frequently used contacts pinned for fast access.
shared_spaces_detail: Working groups and shared calendars in rotation.
recent_people_item_1: Olena Petrova — weekly planning and review.
recent_people_item_2: Mark Rivera — product syncs and quick approvals.
recent_people_item_3: Design team — shared focus blocks and milestones.
relationship_shortcuts_item_1: Open a collaborator’s availability in one click.
relationship_shortcuts_item_2: Surface shared calendar conflicts before sending invites.
relationship_shortcuts_item_3: Keep team-specific time zones visible in the header.
using_calendar_event: Using the event opened from the calendar page.
choose_event_hint: Choose a calendar event before inviting someone.
notifications_description: Keep reminders, nudges, and event changes in one place so important updates stay visible without noise.
unread_detail: Items waiting for a quick review.
reminders_detail: Time-sensitive alerts for the next 24 hours.
digest_items_detail: Low-priority updates ready for batch review.
priority_alerts_item_2: A shared calendar invite is awaiting confirmation.
priority_alerts_item_3: One reminder needs a new snooze time.
quiet_by_design_item_1: Daily digest collapses repetitive updates into a single card.
quiet_by_design_item_2: Only urgent changes stay pinned at the top.
quiet_by_design_item_3: All background noise remains out of the way until opened.
settings_description: Shape the calendar, appearance, and notification defaults around the way you actually work.
security_detail: Session and login safeguards stay active.
appearance_item_1: Keep the light shell or switch to a softer dark mode.
appearance_item_2: Tune density for desktop and mobile independently.
appearance_item_3: Preserve the branded style across assistant and sidebar.
preferences_item_1: Set the default calendar view and start day.
preferences_item_2: Adjust language, time zone, and working hours.
preferences_item_3: Manage notification cadence for reminders and summaries.
compact_density_detail: Condense cards and spacing on desktop.
email_digest_detail: Receive a calm daily summary of what changed.
